# Test audio

`zh.wav` comes from the public SenseVoice test set distributed by k2-fsa:

https://huggingface.co/csukuangfj/sherpa-onnx-sense-voice-zh-en-ja-ko-yue-2024-07-17/blob/main/test_wavs/zh.wav

It is included only for end-to-end model verification. User microphone recordings named `local-*.wav` are ignored by Git.
